_notes: Unlike examples 30 / 31 / 32 this example DOES enable the proxy
admin listener (port 9090). The admin listener serves /healthz
(liveness probe) and the JWKS document at
feature_endpoints[] is empty: the smoke runner's data-plane
probes hit data_plane_port (8080), and the JWKS endpoint lives
on the admin port (9090). The Makefile's `make jwks` target
covers the JWKS document for hands-on validation; full
audit_check stays false until Wave 2 (R1.2) ships the OSS
